heading: Omitted
label: 255a, 255b Omitted
notes: CodificationSections, , §§ 1, 2, , which related to protection for officers and buildings, jurisdiction of offenses and penalties, and permitted picketing, are of particular application to the District of Columbia.act Feb. 15, 1938, ch. 2952 Stat. 30
